Enum esriAreaUnits

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Esri area measurement units.

[Guid("40092EB3-F1B9-438A-894E-BDF488E8218E")]
public enum esriAreaUnits

Fields

esriAcres = 4

4: International Acres.

esriAcresUS = 16

16: US Survey Acres.

esriAreaUnitsLast = 20

20: Internal use only.

esriAres = 10

10: Ares.

esriHectares = 11

11: Hectares.

esriSquareCentimeters = 7

7: Square Centimeters.

esriSquareDecimeters = 8

8: Square Decimeters.

esriSquareFeet = 2

2: International Square Feet.

esriSquareFeetUS = 14

14: Square US Survey Feet.

esriSquareInches = 1

1: International Square Inches.

esriSquareInchesUS = 13

13: Square US Survey Inches.

esriSquareKilometers = 12

12: Square Kilometers.

esriSquareMeters = 9

9: Square Meters.

esriSquareMiles = 5

5: International Square Miles.

esriSquareMilesUS = 17

17: Square US Survey Miles.

esriSquareMillimeters = 6

6: International Square Millimeters.

esriSquareNauticalMiles = 18

18: Square International Nautical Miles.

esriSquareNauticalMilesUS = 19

19: Square US Nautical Miles.

esriSquareYards = 3

3: International Square Yards.

esriSquareYardsUS = 15

15: Square US Survey Yards.

esriUnknownAreaUnits = 0

0: Unknown
